titles.en: Chapter on Departing Early to Mina Before the Day of Tarwiyah
Chapter on Departing Early to Mina Before the Day of Tarwiyah

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَتَعَجَّلُ اَلرَّجُلُ قَبْلَ اَلتَّرْوِيَةِ بِيَوْمٍ أَوْ يَوْمَيْنِ مِنْ أَجْلِ اَلزِّحَامِ وَ ضِغَاطِ اَلنَّاسِ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَتَعَجَّلُ اَلرَّجُلُ قَبْلَ اَلتَّرْوِيَةِ بِيَوْمٍ أَوْ يَوْمَيْنِ مِنْ أَجْلِ اَلزِّحَامِ وَ ضِغَاطِ اَلنَّاسِ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.

segments:
Hadith.2974 - It was narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said:
I said to Abu al-Hasan (as): "Can a person leave for Mina a day or two before the Day of Tarwiyah to avoid the crowd and congestion?"
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2974 - It was narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said:
I said to Abu al-Hasan (as): "Can a person leave for Mina a day or two before the Day of Tarwiyah to avoid the crowd and congestion?"
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."

narratorChain.raw: رُوِيَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on Departing Early to Mina Before the Day of Tarwiyah

segments: 2975 - وَ قَالَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : «لاَ يَتَعَجَّلُ بِأَكْثَرَ مِنْ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ.
arabic.text: 2975 - وَ قَالَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : «لاَ يَتَعَجَّلُ بِأَكْثَرَ مِنْ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ.

segments:
Hadith.2975 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
"A person should not leave earlier than three days in advance."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2975 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
"A person should not leave earlier than three days in advance."

titles.en: Chapter on Departing Early to Mina Before the Day of Tarwiyah

segments: : «عَلَى اَلْإِمَامِ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ اَلظُّهْرَ بِمِنًى ثُمَّ يَبِيتَ بِهَا وَ يُصْبِحَ حَتَّى تَطْلُعَ اَلشَّمْسُ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجَ إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ ».
arabic.text: : «عَلَى اَلْإِمَامِ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ اَلظُّهْرَ بِمِنًى ثُمَّ يَبِيتَ بِهَا وَ يُصْبِحَ حَتَّى تَطْلُعَ اَلشَّمْسُ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجَ إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ ».

segments:
Hadith.2976 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is incumbent upon the Imam to pray the Zuhr prayer in Mina, spend the night there, and remain until sunrise. Then, he should depart for Arafat."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2976 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is incumbent upon the Imam to pray the Zuhr prayer in Mina, spend the night there, and remain until sunrise. Then, he should depart for Arafat."

narratorChain.raw: 2976 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Departing Early to Mina Before the Day of Tarwiyah

segments:
Hadith.2977 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Abu Ja'far (as):
"Did the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) pray the Zuhr prayer in Mina on the Day of Tarwiyah?"
Imam (as) said: "Yes, and also the Fajr prayer on the Day of Arafah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2977 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Abu Ja'far (as):
"Did the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) pray the Zuhr prayer in Mina on the Day of Tarwiyah?"
Imam (as) said: "Yes, and also the Fajr prayer on the Day of Arafah."

narratorChain.raw: 2977 - وَ سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : هَلْ صَلَّى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اَلظُّهْرَ، بِمِنًى يَوْمَ اَلتَّرْوِيَةِ قَالَ

parts.text: سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : هَلْ صَلَّى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
